subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath attained unto His days and hearkeneth unto the Call when it was raised betwixt earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فاز بایامه و سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع بین الارض و السماء و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
